name: Chicken Mozzarella
recipeIngredient: 8 Boneless, Skinned Chicken Breast Halves (2 Lbs.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine breadcrumbs and wheat germ; set aside.
2. Trim excess fat from chicken breasts.
3. Place chicken between two sheets of waxed paper and flatten to 1/4 inch thickness using a rolling pin or meat mallet.
4. Dip chicken in milk, then dredge in breadcrumb mixture.
5. Coat a large skillet with cooking spray and heat over medium heat until hot.
6. Add chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides. Drain on paper towels.
7. Pour one-third of tomato sauce into a 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking dish coated with cooking spray.
8. Place chicken breasts in the dish.
9. Pour half of the remaining tomato sauce over the chicken; sprinkle with parsley, basil, oregano, pepper, garlic, and cheese.
10. Top with remaining tomato sauce.
11. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
